what_was_done: Session 234: Consolidated FTS5 → LanceDB native FTS + TagIndex. Deleted 268-line FTS5Index class, replaced with ~60-line TagIndex (minimal SQLite tags table for boolean AND/OR search). LanceDB native BM25 handles keyword search (~19ms). Net: +134/-229 lines. Tags.db is self-healing — rebuilds from LanceDB on startup. All 1425 tests pass. Deferred vector index re-add (~22 months away). Compared all 4 branches side-by-side. Committed stale backup file deletions.
next_steps: Build Claude API adapter for agent-bench (real API scoring)
Consider removing ChromaDB dependency entirely after validation period
Memory maintenance — DB at 1409 entries, run stale cleanup

LanceDB flat scan ~3x slower than ChromaDB HNSW (30ms vs 10ms) — acceptable at current scale
